data.title: The Daily: Ripple, Circle and BitGo win conditional approval for US banking charters, Hex Trust to issue and custody wrapped XRP, and more

data.title: Vanguard Dismisses Bitcoin as Toy Despite U-Turn
data.description:
Vanguard continues to see Bitcoin as a digital toy for now.
source: https://u.today/vanguard-dismisses-bitcoin-as-toy-despite-u-turn

data.title: Bitcoin To Hit $150,000 By 2026, Treasury President Predicts
data.description:
A Bitcoin Standard Treasury Company (BSTR) executive has predicted that Bitcoin will reach $150k by the end of 2026, citing a confluence of regulatory clarity, monetary easing, and Wall Street adoption. The forecast arrives even as Bitcoin is trading about 28% below its all-time high. BTC is currently trading at approximately $90,180, down about 0. 59% […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-to-hit-150k-by-2026-treasury-president-says/

data.title: BitGo Among Five Digital Asset Firms to Receive National Bank Charters
data.description:
The Office Comptroller of the Currency on Friday approved applications for National Bank Charters from BitGo Bank & Trust, Fidelity Digital Assets, Paxos Trust Company, and Ripple National Trust Bank.
source: https://www.nftgators.com/bitgo-among-five-digital-asset-firms-to-receive-national-bank-charters/

data.title: Top prediction markets form coalition to fight back against lobby groups
data.description:
Major prediction market platforms, including Kalshi and Coinbase, have formed a coalition as a coordinated response to state casino regulators trying to flex their authority on prediction markets. The regulators claim that these new markets are unlawful betting platforms. Kalshi, Coinbase, Crypto. com, and other prediction market platforms have entered into a coalition to defend federal […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/prediction-markets-form-coalition/

data.title: Strategy’s BTC Yield turns negative for first time in years
data.description:
The BTC Yield of MSTR stock in Michael Saylor’s treasury company, Strategy, has turned negative this quarter for the first time in years.
source: https://protos.com/strategys-btc-yield-turns-negative-for-first-time-in-years/

data.title: Price predictions 12/12: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, ADA, BCH, HYPE, LINK
data.description:
Bitcoin and several major altcoins have turned down from their respective overhead resistance levels, indicating that the bears are still very active at the range highs.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/price-predictions-12-12-btc-eth-bnb-xrp-sol-doge-ada-bch-hype-link?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Six Fed officials opposed rate cuts as economy faces major threats in 2026
data.description:
Top officials at the Federal Reserve are sharply divided over where interest rates should go next, with several policymakers speaking out Friday following a controversial decision to cut rates earlier this week. The comments came just two days after the Fed lowered its benchmark interest rate by a quarter percentage point on Wednesday. That marked […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/six-fed-officials-opposed-rate-cuts/

data.title: U.S. National Banking Regulator Grants Trust Charters to Five Crypto Banks
data.description:
BitGo, Circle, Fidelity, Paxos, and Ripple have all received national trust bank charters.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/news/u-s-national-banking-regulator-grants-trust-charters-to-five-crypto-banks

data.title: Wintermute Transfers 435.91 BTC to Anonymous Address
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 03:05, a total of 435.91 BTC was transferred from Wintermute to an anonymous address beginning with 3DdT63.

data.title: Jupiter Unveils JupUSD Stablecoin and Major Solana Ecosystem Upgrades
data.description:
Jupiter announced seven coordinated upgrades at Breakpoint, led by JupUSD stablecoin developed with Ethena, alongside Developer Platform launch, Terminal consolidation, and Rain. fi acquisition to expand lending capabilities across Solana's DeFi infrastructure.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/jupiter-unveils-jupusd-stablecoin-and-major-solana-ecosystem-upgrades/

data.title: Bitcoin swings above $94K as crypto faces ‘Netscape’ moment: Finance Redefined
data.description:
Bitcoin briefly topped $94,000 following Strategy’s largest investment since July, but investor risk appetite remained muted even after the widely expected US interest rate cut.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-swings-94k-crypto-netscape-moment?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Pyth to launch reserve using buybacks from DAO treasury funds
data.description:
The network’s reserve will consist of purchases of the network’s native PYTH token, utilizing approximately 33% of the protocol’s revenue through the DAO.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/pyth-reserve-dao-treasury-funds?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
